title: Low Income/Subsidized Private Rental Housing * Agricultural Laborers - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Housing & Shelter > Low Income/Subsidized Private Rental Housing * Agricultural Laborers 2 Matching Service Providers Refine Results - Select - No Filter Adults With Disabilities/Health Conditions Agricultural Laborers Foster Families Mental Health Issues Older Adults Substance Use Disorder Issues Veteran/Military Personnel Issues Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF HOUSING AUTHORITY OF YAMHILL COUNTY Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides Housing Choice Voucher (HCV) rental assistance, including a Homeownership Voucher Program. Also offers a Family Self-Sufficiency program, Housing Rehab program, and manages several area affordable housing complexes for families, farmworkers, older adults, and people with special needs. 135 NE Dunn Place Mcminnville, OR 97128 Eligibility: Varies; some programs may have residency or income requirements. Call for information. Hours: Monday-Thursday 8am-noon and 1pm-5pm Email (503) 883-4300 Get Directions Visit Website More Details VIRIDIAN MANAGEMENT LOW INCOME RENTAL HOUSING Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a website for properties that offer affordable, low-income, and subsidized apartments. Properties may have waitlists. 200 E Main Street Enterprise, OR 97828 Eligibility: Varies by property. Must meet income guidelines. Some properties require at least one household member to be an older adult, an adult with a disability, a person with chronic mental illness, or a farm laborer. Hours: Varies by property Email (541) 426-3820 Get Directions Visit Website More Details HOUSING AUTHORITY OF YAMHILL COUNTY HOUSING AUTHORITY OF YAMHILL COUNTY VIRIDIAN MANAGEMENT LOW INCOME RENTAL HOUSING
